title: viola muehldorfii
intro: Viola muehldorfii, also known as the Muehldorf violet or Korean violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola muehldorfii include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola muehldorfii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
